title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dove India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dove India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Dove India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
